creator: jonc@chen.org.nz
text:
On 27/09/2011 10:10, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of databases/squirrel-sql,
>
> Please note that PR ports/161042 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/161042

Looks good to commit.
-- 
Jonathan Chen <jonc@chen.org.nz>
